discharge_obligations.role: prove or supply a certified payload that the restricted-continuation energy is time-regular enough for differentiation
prove or supply a certified payload that the solution has the spatial regularity required for integration by parts
prove or supply a certified payload that the energy density is differentiable along the restricted-continuation route
convert the regularity-and-differentiation ledger group from declared_not_discharged to a proof-targeted discharge surface only after payloads exist

positive: Records the first analytic assumption discharge target after the discharge ledger.
Selects the regularity-and-differentiation group as the first analytic group to attack.
Separates time regularity, spatial regularity for integration by parts, and energy-density differentiability as distinct obligations.
negative: Does not prove spatial regularity for integration by parts.
Does not discharge the regularity-and-differentiation assumption group.
Does not prove the formal restricted-continuation theorem.
Does not close the full RR theorem.
